ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the department */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the department was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the department was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the role */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the permission */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, update, delete) */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Details of the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the activity occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
